news.headline: IO Biotech will be presenting at the upcoming 45th Cowen Health Care Conference.
Vector Laboratories partners with UK's Etcembly in a collaboration to speed up the development of new immunotherapies.
news.summary: Vector Laboratories, based in Newark, California, a company specializing in manufacturing reagents and critical components for life sciences tools, diagnostics, and clinical-stage biotherapeutics, has revealed a new partnership with Etcembly, a UK biotech company focused on utilizing machine learning to advance novel immunotherapies. This collaboration aims to speed up the enhancement of recombinant antibody therapeutics by leveraging Vector's expertise. This partnership signifies a push toward innovative solutions in the biotech industry, with the potential to greatly impact the development of new treatments.

news.headline: Fortress Building Products unveils Evolution Tile Deck Tray, meeting demand for fire-safe, personalized outdoor spaces. Feb. 20, 2025, GARLAND, Texas.
news.summary: Fortress Building Products, a leading manufacturer of outdoor building products, has unveiled a new innovation that will cater to the growing need for fire-safe and customized outdoor living spaces. Based in GARLAND, Texas, the company introduced this purpose-built solution on February 20, 2025. This development aims to provide contractors with the tools necessary to meet the increasing demand for safe and personalized outdoor areas. This advancement showcases the company's commitment to evolving and meeting market requirements.

news.headline: Pye-Barker Fire & Safety buys Secure Pacific and Sonitrol Pacific to boost security services in the West.Characters: 103
news.summary: In Atlanta on February 20, 2025, Pye-Barker Fire & Safety, the top fully integrated fire protection, life safety, and security services provider in the US, completed the acquisition of Secure Pacific and Sonitrol Pacific. These sister security and alarm companies cater to a considerable client base.

news.headline: Klaviyo unveils B2C CRM for consumer brands, targeting 167,000+ businesses – major move beyond marketing.
news.summary: In Boston, Klaviyo (NYSE: KVYO), a company serving over 167,000 businesses, unveiled Klaviyo B2C CRM, the first CRM designed specifically for consumer brands. This move signifies Klaviyo's expansion into customer service alongside its traditional marketing focus. The comprehensive platform combines Klaviyo Marketing, Klaviyo Analytics, and Klaviyo Service, all powered by the Klaviyo Data Platform (KDP). The aim is to assist brands in boosting engagement with their customers.

news.headline: Travel insurance isn't just for luxury trips - important for all types of travel. Squaremouth highlights its importance.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on February 20, 2025, it was highlighted that travel insurance is not just for luxurious vacations, but is crucial for safeguarding various types of trips. Squaremouth, a leading travel insurance provider in the country, emphasized the importance of this coverage for a wide range of journeys, from adventurous escapades to educational study abroad programs. This underlines the significance of travel insurance, which goes beyond traditional perception and caters to all kinds of travel experiences, ensuring protection regardless of the nature of the trip.

news.headline: Boehringer Ingelheim appoints Brian Hilberdink as President, U.S. Human Pharma to drive new product launches.
news.summary: A seasoned professional in the industry is set to join Boehringer to enhance their pipeline and facilitate new product launches to cater to pressing unmet patient needs. Boehringer Ingelheim Pharmaceuticals, Inc. revealed the addition of Brian Hilberdink as President on Feb. 20, 2025, in Ridgefield, Connecticut. This move underlines the company's commitment to driving innovation and addressing critical healthcare challenges.

news.headline: Zenity recognized as a Representative Vendor in Gartner® Market Guide for AI TRiSM 2025 report. Tel Aviv-Yafo, Israel.
news.summary: In the latest report for AI Governance and Runtime Inspection and Enforcement released in 2025, the company based in TEL AVIV-YAFO, Israel has been acknowledged as a Representative Vendor. Zenity, specializing in securing AI Agents, was highlighted in the report for its innovative approach. This recognition solidifies Zenity's position in the industry and showcases its commitment to excellence.

news.headline: Social Kapture launches marketing dashboard to solve multibillion-dollar inefficiency in multifamily marketing, increasing ROI with analytics. Los Angeles, Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: Marketing Intelligence Platform, Social Kapture, based in Los Angeles, announced on Feb. 20, 2025, its aim to enhance operations and boost ROI. The platform utilizes advanced analytics and data-driven insights to cater to the multifamily industry. This full-service digital marketing agency aims to streamline operations and improve efficiency. Through their services, they seek to provide better return on investment.

news.headline: AI startup Together valued at $3.3B as demand for AI rises.
Milestone met at Halleck Creek with 10X rare earth upgrade shown at production scale using low-cost methods.
news.summary: A successful demonstration at production scale has shown a 10-fold increase in the upgrade of rare earth elements using conventional low-cost methods. This advancement is significant as it allows for more efficient extraction and processing of rare earth elements, which are crucial components in various industries. This achievement marks a major milestone in the industry, with the potential to greatly impact production capabilities and reduce costs associated with rare earth elements.

news.headline: a.k.a. Brands Holding Corp. (NYSE: AKA) to report Q4 and fiscal 2024 results on March 6, 2025 at 1:30 pm PT/4:30 pm ET. Webcast available at ir.aka-brands.com.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a.k.a. Brands Holding Corp. (NYSE: AKA), a collection of innovative fashion brands, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 post-market close on Thursday, March 6, 2025. A management call is scheduled to take place at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time (1:30 p.m. Pacific Time) on the same day, with a webcast accessible through the company's website at ir.aka-brands.com for analysts and investors.

news.headline: PhiCap Advisors launches new website (www.phicapadvisors.com) to support energy transition companies, offering strategic leadership.
news.summary: PhiCap Advisors, LLC, based in Philadelphia, has recently unveiled its updated website, www.phicapadvisors.com, showcasing its intensified focus on assisting pioneering companies within the energy transition industry. The revamped digital platform demonstrates PhiCap's distinctive method as collaborative leaders who closely engage with developing businesses to deliver strategic guidance and financial backing. This move signifies PhiCap's commitment to supporting innovative energy transition enterprises.

news.headline: Arelion tests 1,069km IP transmission using Cisco 800G ZR+ optics on Stockholm-Hamburg route.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Arelion reported the successful completion of a field trial on its long-haul route connecting Stockholm, Sweden, and Hamburg, Germany. The company utilized Cisco 800G ZR+ Coherent pluggable optical modules in Cisco 8000 series routers during the trial. This marks a significant advancement in the field of networking technology, showcasing the capabilities of high-speed connectivity over vast distances.

news.headline: FuelCell Energy releases 2024 Annual & Sustainability Reports, detailing business performance & sustainability progress. (C: FCEL)
news.summary: In Danbury, Connecticut, on February 20, 2025, FuelCell Energy, Inc. (Nasdaq: FCEL) unveiled its 2024 Annual Report and 2024 Sustainability Report. The reports provide detailed insights into the company's financial performance throughout fiscal year 2024 and its advancements toward achieving sustainability objectives.

news.headline: Collibra, an industry leader, has earned top rankings in Data and AI Governance by multiple firms in 2024 and 2025.
news.summary: Collibra, a data management and governance company, was recently recognized as a leader by several prominent research firms including Gartner, IDC MarketScape, Bloor Research, BARC, McKnight Consulting Group, ISG, and others. This recognition was announced on February 20, 2025, in New York and Brussels. The company has consistently received high praise from industry experts, solidifying its position as a key player in the field.

news.headline: OSS secures $6M contract renewals for US DoD programs; $4M for P-8A radar, $2M for Virginia Class submarine sonar.
news.summary: Contracts worth $4 million for radar processing on the P-8A Poseidon Aircraft and $2 million for upgrading sonar sensor processing on the Virginia Class Submarine have been renewed.

news.headline: DNOW!® US, a subsidiary of eGlue, focuses on Customer Interaction Management in Print Services Provider markets, facilitating digital transformations.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Milan and Fort Collins, Colorado, a company called DNOW!® revealed exciting news as a subsidiary of eGlue, a prominent player in Customer Interaction Management (CIM). Specializing in aiding digital transformations within the Print Services Provider (PSP) sector globally, DNOW!® is at the forefront. The company takes pride in its role as a leader, contributing significantly to the evolution and growth of PSP markets.

news.headline: Mainz Biomed expands into Switzerland with a new team.
Stellantis introduces STLA AutoDrive: hands-free, eyes-off autonomous tech for driving comfort in new era.
news.summary: Stellantis introduces the STLA AutoDrive, an innovative autonomous technology that allows for hands-free and eyes-off driving. This cutting-edge feature is set to revolutionize the driving experience, offering a new level of comfort and convenience for users. The STLA AutoDrive represents a significant advancement in autonomous technology, creating a safer and more enjoyable driving environment.

news.headline: Chromatin Bioscience joins JLABS EMEA, Johnson & Johnson's incubator network, as a leading innovator in gene therapies.
news.summary: Edinburgh, Scotland on February 20, 2025 - Chromatin Bioscience, a prominent designer of synthetic promoters and gene control systems for cell and gene therapies, has recently become a member of Johnson & Johnson's global incubator network, JLABS EMEA. This collaboration marks a significant development for Chromatin Bioscience as it continues to innovate in the field.

news.headline: At Frieze LA, illycaffè unveils new Art Collection by Bonvicini, Diaw, Fattal, and Neshat to highlight human rights.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on February 20, 2025, illycaffè, a leading global coffee brand known for its sustainable practices and strong ties to contemporary art, announces its ongoing partnership with Frieze Los Angeles as the official global coffee sponsor. This marks the sixth year of collaboration between the two entities.

news.headline: Taco Bell and Milk Bar launch new Birthday Cake Churros nationwide, combining Mexican favorite with Milk Bar's flavor.
news.summary: Today marks the launch of a new collaboration between Taco Bell and Milk Bar, showcasing a creative fusion of flavors. This partnership brings together a popular Mexican treat with Milk Bar's signature birthday cake taste. The collaboration offers customers a chance to experience a unique blend that combines the best of both brands. This new product is set to bring a big birthday energy to everyday celebrations. It is now available for fans to enjoy, capturing the essence of a birthday in every bite.

news.headline: Demandbase hires Greg Philiotis as CRO, with 30+ years leading revenue growth worldwide.  - Feb 20, 2025.
news.summary: Experienced leader Greg Philiotis, with over 30 years of successful experience in expanding revenue and fostering growth within international teams, has been appointed by Demandbase in San Francisco on Feb. 20, 2025. Demandbase, a top account-based GTM platform for B2B firms, has brought on Philiotis to enhance their team and boost operations.

news.headline: Syensqo partners with Emulseo for healthcare advancements in microfluidics market. Bordeaux, France, Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: Syensqo, a prominent specialty chemicals firm based in BORDEAUX, France, revealed on Feb. 20, 2025, its new venture into the rapidly expanding microfluidics market. The company is excited to announce a strategic collaboration with Emulseo, a French enterprise renowned for its expertise in formulations. This partnership aims to capitalize on the growth potential within the industry and leverage the respective strengths of the two companies. This move signifies a significant step for Syensqo as they tap into the microfluidics sector, which is valued at approximately $10 billion globally.

news.headline: Multiple credit products expected to grow in originations in 2025. Auto +2.7%, Mortgage +13.3%, Personal Loans +5.7% YoY. Mortgages may rise from 4.6M in 2024 to 5.7M in 2025. Unsecured personal loans may increase to 20.8M originations. Card delinquencies down, with balances seeing growth.
news.summary: TransUnion's Q4 2024 report indicates a positive outlook for credit products in 2025 despite doubts on interest rate cuts. Auto, mortgage, and unsecured personal loans are expected to grow by +2.7%, +13.3%, and +5.7% respectively. Auto originations may be tempered by high interest rates, inflation, and supply issues. Mortgage originations are forecasted to rise to 5.7 million, mostly in purchases. Unsecured personal loans are predicted to reach 20.8 million. The credit card market in Q4 2024 saw decreases in delinquencies but an increase in balances. The report also outlines trends in card lending metrics with 561.5 million cards, delinquency rate at 2.56%, total balances of $1.11 trillion, average debt at $6,580 per borrower, and 173.1 million consumers carrying balances. These insights suggest a steady growth trajectory for various credit products in 2025.

news.headline: Docupace named WealthTech Employer of the Year, joins global elite firms. Feb 20, 2025, HOLMDEL, N.J. - PRNewswire.
news.summary: Docupace, based in HOLMDEL, N.J., recently gained recognition as an industry leader in back-office solutions. The company, known for its software that enhances the efficiency of wealth management firms and financial advisors, has been honored with a prestigious award. This latest achievement further solidifies Docupace's position among the top global firms in its field. The announcement was made on Feb. 20, 2025, and signifies the company's continued success within the industry.

news.headline: GlobalMed and ADS partner to improve care access and efficiency for the US Government, strengthening distribution operations.
news.summary: Recently, GlobalMed, a prominent player in digital health solutions, revealed a fresh agreement with ADS, a top supplier of operational equipment and logistics aid to the U.S. Government. This partnership signifies a significant milestone for both companies, as they join forces to enhance services. The agreement, effective as of February 20, 2025, is poised to leverage ADS's expertise with the U.S. Government alongside GlobalMed's innovative digital health solutions. This collaboration is anticipated to deliver substantial benefits, with both entities aligning their capabilities for mutual success.

news.headline: Global mozzarella cheese market to hit $68.59 billion by 2034, with a 5.9% CAGR. US market to reach $11.63 billion. Sales through supermarkets to reach $34.19 billion.
news.summary: The global mozzarella cheese market reached US$ 38.6 billion in 2024 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 5.9% over the next 10 years, reaching a value of US$ 68.59 billion by 2034. The market in the United States is forecasted to hit US$ 11.63 billion, while Japan is expected to hold a 19.3% market share in East Asia in 2024. The household segment is anticipated to have a market share of 22.37% in 2024, with sales through supermarkets/hypermarkets projected to reach US$ 34.19 billion by 2034. The increase is attributed to the population becoming more health-conscious, with diabetic food manufacturers being significant consumers of mozzarella cheese.

news.headline: Metaba and MAX BioPharma make progress on next-gen oxysterol-based antibiotics to target bacteria.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Metaba, LLC and MAX BioPharma, Inc. disclosed notable advancements in their partnership focusing on creating oxysterol-based drugs to combat bacterial pathogens. The collaboration between the two companies is directed towards the development of potentially groundbreaking drug candidates. This initiative signifies a positive step forward in the quest to address antibiotic-resistant bacteria and improve treatment strategies. For more information, visit www.metaba.us and www.maxbiopharma.com.

news.headline: Monarch Private Capital achieves record growth with $1.5 billion in renewable energy tax credits, 23 affordable housing projects, and $268 million in tax credits. Leading in impact investing for a sustainable future.
news.summary: Monarch Private Capital had a successful year in 2024, expanding efforts in affordable housing, renewable energy, historic rehabilitation, and film projects. Their initiatives generated billions in economic development and transformative change in communities across the US. Key achievements include a $275 million bond issuance, a solar and battery storage program for low-income housing, and record-breaking investments in various projects. In renewable energy, Monarch executed 75 projects resulting in $1.5 billion in tax credits, $3.3 billion in clean energy investments, and 1.7 GW of renewable energy capacity, while preventing 1,530,807 metric tons of CO₂e emissions annually. They also completed 23 affordable housing projects, unlocking $268 million in tax credits and $747 million in project capital, providing 2,429 affordable homes. Additionally, 18 historic rehabilitation projects were undertaken, contributing to the overall success of Monarch's impact investing initiatives. With the momentum gained in 2024, Monarch is poised to make an even greater impact in 2025.

news.headline: Yong-doo Kim, Chairman of SNS Journalists Federation in South Korea, to host the ICAE 2025 conference in Seoul in November.
news.summary: The International Conference in Action for the Earth Environment (ICAE) is set to take place in November 2025 at the National Assembly Member's Hall of Korea in SEOUL, South Korea. Yong-doo Kim, Chairman of SNS Journalist Federation & TSN KOREA, is heavily involved in the event. The conference is expected to draw a significant number of participants, with discussions centered on environmental issues.

news.headline: Arizona Femtech startup Prickly Pear Health surpasses $250k pre-seed funding goal, backed by Bayless Ventures and AZ Venture Capital.
news.summary: A digital health platform utilizing artificial intelligence is tackling cognitive wellness issues during menopause with the support of Bayless Ventures and AZ Venture Capital Inc. On February 20, 2025, in Phoenix, Prickly Pear Health, specializing in brain health for menopausal individuals, announced its latest initiative.

news.headline: Encore Construction starts work on Sugared + Bronzed's first D.C. location; popular beauty destination expanding.
news.summary: Encore Construction has recently started construction on a new branch of Sugared + Bronzed in downtown Washington, D.C. This sugaring hair removal and sunless-tanning facility already has operational centers in various states including New York, California, Pennsylvania, and Texas. The expansion project is indicative of the company's growth strategy and commitment to providing services in prominent locations. The development signifies an exciting milestone for Sugared + Bronzed as it continues to expand its presence across the United States.

news.headline: StorMagic and Supermicro verified SvHCI with three Supermicro Servers for Edge Computing solutions.
news.summary: StorMagic, a company based in Bristol, England, has confirmed the compatibility of its SvHCI solution with three Supermicro IoT SuperServers on February 20, 2025. This validation ensures the effectiveness of the solution in addressing edge data issues. This development showcases the diverse applications of edge computing in the tech industry.

news.headline: Esri partners with Freefly Systems to integrate Blue UAS cleared Astro Max drone with ArcGIS Flight app, enhances security for competitive edge.
news.summary: Esri, a renowned leader in location intelligence, based in Redlands, California, is making strides in the drone industry by supporting the Astro Max drone. This drone, developed by Esri partner Freefly Systems, is the first Blue UAS cleared and NDAA-compliant drone. By integrating with Esri's ArcGIS Flight app, the Astro Max ensures compliance with federal regulations. This American-made drone emphasizes security and performance, making it a competitive choice in the fast-evolving drone market. Esri's technological support highlights the importance of innovation and adherence to regulations in this industry.

news.headline: Ginkgo Bioworks partners with HaDEA in up to €24M project to develop agnostic diagnostics for respiratory viruses.
news.summary: A global partnership is being formed to create fast metagenomic Next-Generation Sequencing (NGS) tools capable of detecting both familiar and new respiratory pathogens. The aim is to speed up diagnosis times, improve hospital decision-making, and boost public health readiness. The collaboration includes Ginkgo Bioworks (NYSE: DNA) and other entities. The initiative is set to revolutionize disease detection and response, addressing critical gaps in healthcare systems worldwide. The project is expected to significantly reduce time-to-diagnosis, enhancing the ability to swiftly identify and combat respiratory illnesses.

news.headline: Easterly Government Properties (NYSE: DEA) declares $0.265 dividend per share, payable on March 17, 2025.
news.summary: In Washington, D.C., Easterly Government Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DEA), a real estate investment trust specializing in Class A commercial properties leased to U.S. Government agencies, disclosed its latest financial move. The company's Board of Directors has given the green light for a quarterly cash dividend of $0.265 per common share. Shareholders of record on March 5, 2025, will receive this dividend on March 17, 2025. Easterly Government Properties, Inc. is committed to the acquisition, development, and management of such properties, showcasing financial stability and shareholder value.

news.headline: Positive news for homebuyers: U.S. median home-sale price up 3.7% YoY (smallest increase since Sept), weekly avg mortgage rate lowest at 6.87%.
news.summary: According to a recent report from Redfin, the median U.S. home-sale price increased by 3.7% year over year in the four weeks ending February 16. This marks the smallest rise since September. The average mortgage rate for the week dropped to 6.87%, the lowest point of the year. Even though monthly housing costs are still close to record highs, the slowing price growth and decreasing mortgage rates are noteworthy trends. The data comes from Redfin, a technology-based real estate firm listed on NASDAQ under the ticker RDFN.

news.headline: Semtech's Raza Khan to present at TOP Conference 2025. Discussing optics and photonics. #Semtech #TOPConference2025
news.summary: Semtech Corporation, a leading semiconductor company specializing in high-performance solutions for the Internet of Things (IoT) and cloud connectivity, recently disclosed that Raza Khan, the product marketing director overseeing Semtech’s Signal Integrity Products and serving as the chief marketing officer for the Mobile Optical Pluggables Alliance (MOPA), is scheduled to speak at the Telecommunications, Optics and Photonics (TOP) Conference 2025. The event will concentrate on the latest progress and uses of optics and photonics technologies. Semtech Corporation is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SMTC.

news.headline: Incyte and Genesis Therapeutics partner for AI-focused research collab in Wilmington, Delaware & Burlingame, California.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Incyte and Genesis Therapeutics have revealed a strategic partnership centered on AI-driven research efforts. This collaboration, based in Wilmington, Del., and Burlingame, Calif., aims to leverage artificial intelligence technologies to enhance drug discovery processes. This partnership signifies a significant step towards innovation in the biotechnology sector by combining the expertise of both companies. The partnership is poised to drive breakthroughs in drug development by merging Incyte’s pharmaceutical knowledge with Genesis Therapeutics’ AI capabilities. The collaboration is expected to boost research efficiency and potentially lead to the development of novel therapies. This exciting partnership is anticipated to have a substantial impact on the industry and pave the way for advanced drug discoveries.

news.headline: Soluna (SLNH) partners with Bit Digital (BTBT) in Texas, reaching 12 MW hosting capacity, started with 4.4 MW.
news.summary: Soluna Holdings, Inc., a developer of eco-friendly data centers for demanding computing needs such as Bitcoin mining and AI, revealed a notable development. The company, traded as NASDAQ: SLNH, disclosed a significant 12-month hosting agreement with Bit Digital, listed as NASDAQ: BTBT, at Soluna’s Project Dorothy in Texas. This contract amounts to 5.5 MW, showcasing substantial growth in their collaboration. This partnership has progressed consistently, commencing with a 4.4 MW installation at Project Sophie.

news.headline: Prodoscore introduces AI tool to improve manager and employee performance, in Los Angeles. #innovation #productivity
news.summary: In an announcement made in Los Angeles, Prodoscore has introduced groundbreaking AI technology aimed at improving the performance of managers and employees. This innovative functionality is the first of its kind and is designed to provide actionable insights for enhancing productivity in the workplace. By leveraging artificial intelligence, Prodoscore aims to revolutionize how managers and employees assess and improve their performance.

news.headline: Strategy has priced an offering of $2.0 billion of convertible senior notes due 2030 to qualified institutional buyers.
news.summary: In Tysons Corner, Virginia, Strategy™ disclosed the pricing of its $2.0 billion offering of convertible senior notes due 2030. The notes carry a 0% interest rate and were offered in a private placement to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the amended Securities Act of 1933. Additionally, Strategy granted initial purchasers of the notes an option to acquire additional notes for settlement within a specified period.

news.headline: Akron Children's partners with Abridge for clinical conversations in specialties like primary care, gastroenterology, etc.
news.summary: Akron Children's, one of the top children’s hospitals in the U.S., based in Akron, Ohio, and headquartered in San Francisco, is broadening its utilization of the Abridge generative AI platform for clinical discussions within various pediatric specialties. These include primary care, gastroenterology, cardiology, and pediatric psychiatry. After a successful trial phase that thoroughly assessed Abridge's effectiveness in diverse pediatric settings, healthcare providers noted substantial decreases in cognitive strain and exhaustion.

news.headline: J.D. Power finds utilities struggle to engage customers online.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, a recent report from J.D. Power reveals that utility companies are struggling to effectively engage with their customers through digital channels. The study emphasizes that utilities are not meeting customer expectations when it comes to online interactions. This disconnect is evident in the numbers, with a significant percentage of customers expressing dissatisfaction with the digital service provided by utility companies. The findings underscore the urgent need for utilities to enhance their digital strategies in order to better connect with consumers and improve overall customer satisfaction levels.

news.headline: Ontrak Health launches WholeHealth+ for Intermountain Health, serving Medicare Advantage members in Nevada.
news.summary: In Miami, Ontrak, Inc. (NASDAQ: OTRK), a behavioral healthcare company utilizing AI and telehealth, has introduced its WholeHealth+ program for Medicare Advantage members of Intermountain Health in Nevada. Intermountain Health runs 400 clinics and 34 hospitals in the western U.S., providing quality and tailored care at reasonable costs. The program launch signifies Ontrak's commitment to expanding its services to a wider demographic in collaboration with a respected healthcare system.

news.headline: Pacira (Nasdaq: PCRX) will report Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 27, 2025 - live call at 4:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Parsippany, New Jersey, on February 20, 2025 - Pacira BioSciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: PCRX), a renowned company dedicated to providing cutting-edge, non-opioid pain treatments to improve patient well-being, disclosed its plan to unveil its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and entire year that concluded on December 31, 2024. The release will occur post the American market closure on Thursday, February 27, 2025. Subsequently, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time, the firm will conduct a live conference call and webcast to discuss these figures.

news.headline: AI and IoT lead to 82% spike in DDoS attacks in 2024, with attacks almost doubling from 90,000 to 165,000. Cybercriminals leverage technology for faster, more complex attacks.
news.summary: A prominent global communications infrastructure provider, Zayo Group, unveiled its latest Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) Insights Report. The report indicates a substantial 82% increase in attack frequency from 2023 to 2024. The volume of attacks jumped significantly, nearly doubling from 90,000 incidents in 2023 to 165,000 in 2024. Cybercriminals are exploiting artificial intelligence and the increased use of Internet of Things (IoT) devices to carry out swifter, more enduring, and elaborate attacks. The use of larger botnets by attackers is also observed.

news.headline: John Fuerst named President & CEO of Tula Technology on March 1st in San Jose, Calif.
news.summary: A new development in San Jose, California has seen Tula Technology, Inc. appoint John Fuerst as the new President and CEO starting from March 1st.
